M4-bot-integration.context_summary: Bot receives URL -> validates -> calls /api/parse -> returns Mini App button with article URL. Frontend Reader page fetches article from API and renders it.

M5-curtain-ux.context_summary: Touch swipe gesture on paragraph blocks. Swipe up ~30% -> block snaps to translated state showing Russian text. Swipe down -> snaps back to English. Code blocks are inert. 60fps animation with Framer Motion.

M6-theme-polish.context_summary: Auto-detect Telegram theme (light/dark) via @twa-dev/sdk. Apply CSS variables for colors. Inline-code inside paragraphs preserved (not translated). Syntax highlight code blocks.

M7-deploy.context_summary: VPS deployment: backend on VPS (Docker with uvicorn), frontend on Vercel (static build). HTTPS via reverse proxy. Smoke test on real mobile device in Telegram.
